summary: Completed testing of P1 features: Stripe payment integration, session reminders, and photographer bookings manager. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ScheduledBookingDrawer has proper payment method selection with 'credits' and 'card' options (data-testid='pay-with-card-btn')
BookingPaymentSuccess component handles all states: checking, success, timeout, error
PhotographerBookingsManager has edit functionality with openEditModal, handleSaveEdit, and data-testid='edit-booking-btn-${booking.id}'
Session reminder scheduler is registered with 5-minute interval checking for 2hr and 30min reminders
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test bookings during backend testing for update/status tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested: 1) Stripe payment integration working - POST /api/bookings/create-with-stripe returns checkout URL (uses custom domain checkout.raw.surf), 2) GET /api/bookings/payment-success confirms payment, 3) PATCH /api/bookings/{id} updates booking details, 4) PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status updates status, 5) Session reminder scheduler registered (5min interval), 6) PhotographerBookingsManager has edit modal, 7) ScheduledBookingDrawer has payment method selection, 8) BookingPaymentSuccess page handles Stripe return

stripe_integration.create_booking_with_stripe: PASS - Returns checkout URL with session_id, booking_id, amount_to_charge
stripe_integration.payment_success_endpoint: PASS - Validates session_id and booking_id parameters
stripe_integration.checkout_url_format: Uses custom domain checkout.raw.surf (valid Stripe checkout)

booking_management.update_booking_details: PASS - Updates location, date, duration, max_participants

session_reminders.scheduler_registered: PASS - Job ID 'session_reminders' runs every 5 minutes

frontend_components.PhotographerBookingsManager: PASS - Has edit modal with openEditModal, handleSaveEdit
frontend_components.BookingPaymentSuccess: PASS - Handles checking, success, timeout, error states
